name: Fleur D' Feaux Transport LLC
recent_news: No public news, M&A, or web presence located. Not to be confused with 'Fleur De Lis Transportation' of New Orleans (a separate limo/charter operator).
fit_notes: Micro-operator (~3 employees, ~$230K rev) at residential address (Catina St); too small for a Summit tuck-in on its own and unlikely to hold material district contracts. Deprioritize.

name: Super Joes Limo LLC
recent_news: No public news or website located. Registered at residential address (302 Club Cv, Madison MS). A Joe Durastanti also appears on LinkedIn as owner of 'Joe's Super Discount Drugs' in Madison MS — possibly the same individual operating a small side livery LLC.
fit_notes: Name and residential address indicate a single-vehicle limo/livery operation, not a yellow-bus school contractor. Not a credible Summit tuck-in target.

name: Pringle Tours
recent_news: No public news, website, or directory listing located. Residential address in Ontario OH (Mansfield/Richland County area). Local charter market dominated by Barons Bus and similar — no Pringle Tours footprint surfaced.
fit_notes: Appears to be a single-operator charter/tour business, not a yellow-bus school district contractor. Too small and wrong service line for a Summit tuck-in.

name: AAA Transportation
recent_news: Listed in a NC business directory as a transportation-services company at 2240 N New Hope Rd #A, Gastonia; no news, M&A, or contract awards surfaced. Distinct from AAA Transport (medical) and AAA Cooper Transportation (freight).
fit_notes: Tiny owner-operated shop (~4 employees, ~$229K rev) at a commercial address in Gastonia; no evidence of meaningful school-bus fleet or Gaston County Schools contract. Deprioritize for Summit tuck-in.

name: American Alternative Trnsprtn
recent_news: BBB profile (A+, not accredited) confirms American Alternative Transportation, LLC of Charlotte NC, started 29-Jan-2009 by Ms. La Shawn Flynn, 3 employees, categorized as Transportation / Medical Transportation. No school-bus or special-needs SPED contracts identified.
fit_notes: Looks like a small NEMT/medical-transportation operator out of Charlotte, not a yellow-bus or SPED school contractor. Wrong service line and far too small for a Summit tuck-in.
